nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT course.id) AS course_count, COUNT(DISTINCT faculty_cache.employee_id) AS faculty_count, COUNT(DISTINCT board.id) AS board_count, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS script_count, AVG(evaluation_marks.marks_awarded) AS average_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit course ON course.id = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_cache ON faculty_cache.department_id = au.id
JOIN   board ON board.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.evaluator_id = faculty_cache.employee_id
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.id = sa.script_id
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = sa.attempt_id
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'COURSE' AND a.evaluation_status = 'ATTEMPTED' AND sa.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY au.name
ORDER  BY script_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.attempt_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
